def negative_eager_full_file_or_stream_read_when_incremental_iteration_suffices():
    rule_id = "eager_full_file_or_stream_read_when_incremental_iteration_suffices"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag code that reads whole files or streams into memory before simple sequential processing."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
